org.bukkit.entity.ArmorStand.LockType

Packages that use ArmorStand.LockType
Package
Description
org.bukkit.entity
Interfaces for non-voxel objects that can exist in a world, including all players, monsters, projectiles, etc.

    Locks the equipment slot with the specified locking mechanism.

    Returns if the ArmorStand has the specified locking mechanism.
